themes.title: User Data Management
themes.description: Focus on collecting and managing user data effectively while ensuring compliance.

themes.title: Personalization Features
themes.description: Enhance user experience through personalized recommendations and dashboards.

themes.title: User Feedback and Monitoring
themes.description: Implement mechanisms for user feedback and monitoring of the system.

milestones.name: MVP Development
milestones.description: Develop the core functionalities for user behavior tracking and compliance.
milestones.success_criteria: Complete implementation of user behavior tracking, ML recommendation engine, GDPR compliance audit, and data retention policy.

milestones.name: V1 Feature Expansion
milestones.description: Expand features to include user dashboards and cross-device tracking.
milestones.success_criteria: Launch user preference dashboard, cross-device tracking, data export for advertisers, and user engagement metrics tracking.

milestones.name: V2 User Feedback and Monitoring
milestones.description: Implement user feedback collection and monitoring for the data pipeline.
milestones.success_criteria: Successfully collect user feedback and establish monitoring and alerting for the data pipeline.

sequencing.reason: V1 features depend on the successful completion of MVP functionalities.
V2 features require the foundational elements established in V1.

mvp.goal: Establish core functionalities for user data management and compliance.

v1.goal: Enhance personalization features and user engagement.

v2.goal: Implement user feedback mechanisms and monitoring.
